title: Neuromorphic Computing: Brain-Inspired Hardware
author: Ember Scott
Hardware Researcher
description: Program spiking neural networks on neuromorphic chips—but debugging is impossible
content:
Neuromorphic chips mimic biological neural networks with spiking neurons.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Spike Train Cascade (2041)](/docs/articles/spike-train-cascade-2041)
